title: RENT DEPOSIT ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: ACCESS RENT DEPOSIT ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps pay for refundable deposits to get into affordable housing. Service is limited and depends on availability of funding. 3630 Aviation Way Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Varies Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 414-0318 0 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 414-0318 ext 0 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Intent to rent letter or rental agreement LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County Services: Rental Deposit Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY DISASTER SERVICES - CENTER FOR COMMUNITY RESILIENCE FOOD - FOOD PANTRIES FOOD - SENIOR FOOD PANTRIES HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - DURABLE MEDICAL EQUIPMENT PROGRAM HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OVER THE TOP WIG PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - AFFORDABLE HOUSING HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMEOWNERSHIP CENTER HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING RETENTION PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - JACKSON COUNTY CONTINUUM OF CARE SCREENINGS HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES INFORMATION SERVICES - OUTREACH TO SENIORS AND PEOPLE WITH DISABILITIES UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ACCESS
